title: Fork Netlify onboarding canonical
mechanism: Enumerate template/ds-product-template 全 55 file + Read 關鍵環節:(1) netlify.toml — build=build-storybook / publish=storybook-static / NODE 22 / [[edge_functions]] basic-auth wired / X-Robots-Tag noindex headers ✓;(2) basic-auth.ts — 讀 STORYBOOK_BASIC_AUTH env var、未設 = pass-through、401+WWW-Authenticate,中文 step-by-step 檔頭 ✓;(3) manager-head.html + CLAUDE.md「🔒 Access control」段 + setup-netlify-access.mjs — 免費 Edge Function Basic Auth 引導一致(明示 Dashboard Password / _headers 皆 Pro 專屬勿誤導)✓;(4) docs/01-first-time-setup.md → setup:netlify → docs/02 鏈無斷點,治理 committed .claude 自動生效說明 ✓;(5) .npmrc legacy-peer-deps=true 覆蓋裸 npm install(docs/04/05 + devcontainer + workflows 全一致)✓;(6) 實跑 node scripts/build-published-template-mirror.mjs --out=/tmp/mirror-audit-dim62 → exit 0,allowlist 全齊、netlify.toml 引用 script/edge-function 全在、package.json scripts 引用 node scripts/*.mjs 全在(含 postinstall check-plugin-installed)、ES import 鏈完整、DS residue 0 leak、secret 0 leak、版本 transform beta.86 ✓。三道 fail-closed guard(missing allowlist / toml refs / pkg-scripts refs)+ 第四道 import-chain guard 全 live。
